content.en:
The Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord immediately rushed to the side of the Four Thousand Territory, but this time, it would probably take a while to be able to come back.

During this period of time, they told the Blazing Sun Palace not to offend the human race, so as not to cause some special changes.

Subsequently, they left through special channels.

In the blink of an eye, a period of time has passed.

this day.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord are back, but they are in a very bad mood.

Because they paid a huge price in order to buy the Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Sword Talisman, not only spent all the wealth of their bodies, but even borrowed some from a few Fourth Realms, so they reluctantly took down a Taiyi Extinguishing Sword Talisman.

It stands to reason that the Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Sword Talisman should not be so expensive, after all, it is just the Taiyi Extinguishing Sword Talisman made by the Sixth Dimension Will Peerless Sect, but it is rare and expensive!

On the other side of the 4,000th Territory, it is very rare to be able to comprehend the Will Peerlessness, and even if the Will's Peerless Technique is comprehended, it is extremely difficult to refine a Taiyi Annihilation Sword Talisman.

There are very few forces that really have the ability to refine such a will mastery talisman as the Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Talisman, just a few, and they don't sell it much, so it is so expensive.

And this kind of treasure is used at critical moments, it is a hole card and a life-saving thing, which is naturally expensive.

And the most important point is that they themselves are very poor, they are very rich on the side of the 313 domain of the 50000 territory, but on the 4000 territory, then they are very poor.

After returning to the Blazing Sun Palace, they were ready to attack and kill Ye Tian and snatch the treasures on Ye Tian's body, once they succeeded, they would make a lot of money, not only could they return to their capital, but they could also make their net worth several times richer or even more than ten times.

The key is that the great opportunity on Ye Tian's body will also fall into their hands, and when the time comes, they will be able to rise completely, and it is not hopeless to impact the fifth realm in the future.

......

Wow!!

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord rushed to the Human Race at an extremely fast speed, for fear that there would also be other Fourth Realms attacking and killing Ye Tian in advance.

It didn't take long for them to arrive at the extradimensional territory where the Terrans were located.

And for the first time, Ye Tian sensed the figures of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord, but he sensed the killing intent from them.

So, he quickly intercepted these two Fourth Realms.

"Blazing Sun Realm Lord, Taijiang Realm Lord, do you have anything to do with the two of you coming to me?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord said to the Taijiang Realm Lord: "Taijiang, block here. "

"Yes!"

The Taijiang Realm Lord immediately urged his own extra-dimensional rule realm, and then urged an innate multi-dimensional Dao body-Chijiang Body.

The body of the Chijiang has an innate multi-dimensional secret technique that blocks the dimension - the realm of the red river.

In an instant, this piece of void was covered by the phantom of the Chijiang Realm, making it impossible for Ye Tian to escape, even if it was a secret technique that shuttled through the dimension, he didn't want to easily break through the Chijiang Realm.

And the Blazing Sun Realm Lord also burst out with all his own means, and the innate multi-dimensional body of the Purple Yang Body also exploded, and a ray of purple light erupted with the fusion of the Purple Yang Body of the Extra-Dimensional Rule Realm, instantly killing Ye Tian.

This is a top-notch extradimensional supernatural power.

However, in Ye Tian's eyes, the top-notch super-dimensional divine power was not powerful at all.

"I don't even have a multi-dimensional mastery, it's too weak!"

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and pointed, and the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Gravel Tribulation Light Unfolded.

Rumble!!!

The Gravel Tribulation instantly broke through the Blazing Sun Realm Lord's attack, piercing through with unimaginable power and speed.

"Not good!"

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord both changed their faces.

They all recognized it, this is a three-realm multi-dimensional mastery!

Moreover, Ye Tian had two innate multi-dimensional Dao body auras on his body, and both of them had reached the realm of the second layer, what a terrifying attack power.

At the same time, the Blazing Sun Realm Lord recognized Ye Tian as the third realm who had snatched the multi-dimensional treasure bottle at the beginning, but he didn't expect the other party to break through to the fourth realm.

No, that should be Ye Tian's doppelganger, this is the real Ye Tian.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord regretted coming to trouble Ye Tian a little, he never expected that Ye Tian's strength was so terrifying, it was already above him.

Burst!!

Under the Sand and Gravel Raid, the Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord joined forces to resist (ceee) blocks, and most of the damage was blocked by the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, and he was also pierced by the Gravel Raid.

If it weren't for the Ziyang Body of the first layer of Xiaocheng Realm, he would have been killed in seconds, but now he is also in a very bad state, and he has been directly hit hard.

If they take another blow, they won't be able to bear it at all.

"You can only use the Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Talisman!!!!"

They didn't know if the Taiyi Sword Destroying Sword Talisman could break through Ye Tian's defense and hurt the other party's soul will, but they could only try, if they couldn't hurt Ye Tian, they could only take this opportunity to escape.

Airplanes!!!

The Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Talisman emerged, turning into a small long sword in the multi-dimensional void, but it was composed of countless soul wills.

"The will of the sixth dimension is unlearned!

Ye Tian smiled.

He had created his own seventh-dimensional will mastery, and the Blazing Sun Realm Lord dared to use the sixth-dimensional mastery against him, and this spell could not exert the power of the true sixth-dimensional will mastery.

Of course, the power of the sixth dimension will mastery is also related to the user, the soul will of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord is also the seventh dimension, if he is the eighth dimension, this sixth dimension will mastery may be able to give him a little trouble earlier.

But now, it's not enough to tickle him.

The power of the Taiyi Sword Extinguishing Sword Talisman exploded instantly, turning into a sword light and slashing towards Ye Tian's soul will, but the power of this will was slashed on Ye Tian's body, blocked by the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and in the end, only a wisp of Taiyi Sword Destroying Sword Light penetrated into Ye Tian's soul will, and even his soul will could not be shaken.

In other words, this trick is ineffective.

"Run!

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord burned their origins and fled.

But Ye Tian once again unleashed the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sand and Gravel Tribulation, this time aimed at the slower Taijiang Realm Lord.

The defense of the Taijiang Realm Lord was not as powerful as that of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, and all his defense was killed in one blow.

Seeing the fall of the Taijiang Realm Lord, the Blazing Sun Realm Lord only showed a wisp of anger, but he didn't have much fear.

After all, his body is just a doppelganger, but his body is still alive.

He also knew very well that he couldn't live, so he could only secretly swear that if he broke through the fifth realm in the future, he would definitely kill Ye Tian.

At this moment, Ye Tian intercepted the Blazing Sun Realm Lord.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord was about to explode himself, but at this moment, Ye Tianshi exhibited the Seventh Dimension Will Peerless Technique-Wumu Robbery and Killing Technique!

In an instant, the light of the Black Mother's robbery and killing erupted, slashing towards the Blazing Sun Realm Lord.

"It's ......"

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord was frightened, he recognized it, this was the seventh dimensional peerless skill, and it was also performed by Ye Tian himself, and he could give full play to the power of this will peerless mastery, which was far from being comparable to the Taiyi Sword Exterminating Sword Talisman!

The key is, can Ye Tian kill his body with this move?

He didn't dare bet!.
